The '''Battle of Denab''' was an engagement fought early during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Fourth Attack Squadron]] at [[Denab/Legends|Denab]].<ref name="SWS" /> The battle was part of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna's]] campaign to prove that [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] were the most versatile military asset possessed by the Alliance, and that their tactical use would bring victories and undermine the Imperial control of space.<ref name="EGW" />

The battle began when [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]], under the command<ref name="SWS" /> of the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]]<ref name="Sisar">''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]''</ref> [[Grisserno]], attacked the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]] of the Imperial Fourth Attack Squadron. The squadron was arrayed in two wings, and the Alliance ships methodically concentrated their fire on each one in turn, defeating each one at a time. Since the ''Victory''-class Star Destroyers were equipped with the slow [[LF9 ion engine]]s, the two wings were unable to move fast enough to support each other.<ref name="SWS" />
